headline: A Look Back at Healthcare Providers & Services Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: McKesson (NYSE:MCK) Vs The Rest Of The Pack
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the healthcare providers & services industry, including McKesson (NYSE:MCK) and its peers.
